user_query: I'm organizing a family reunion in New York City and need to find the nearest cities within a 50-mile radius for a day trip.

TaskList.description: Query for cities within a 50-mile radius of New York City.
Sort the cities by population and select the five largest cities from the previous results.
Query for the population of the selected cities.
Query for the distance from New York City to each of the selected cities.
Query for local time and time zone information for each of the selected cities.
